basicDetails.schemeName: Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category

schemeSubCategory.value: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend
schemeSubCategory.label: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The &quot;Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category&quot; was launched by the Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- along with a certificate of appreciation is awarded to the top 100 meritorious students of Class 10 and each stream (Science, Commerce, Arts) of Class 12, who are listed in the state-level merit list of the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE), Ajmer. The scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Rajasthan, Bikaner.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Financial Assistance:**


  - One-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- is provided to economically backward students from the general category studying in government and private schools.

> **Certificate of Appreciation:**


  - An official certificate is awarded along with the monetary benefit.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- along with a certificate of appreciation is awarded to top 100 meritorious students of Class 10 & each stream of Class 12, who are listed in state-level merit list of Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer.

children.text: The "Incentive Scheme for Meritorious Students of Economically Backward Class of General Category" was launched by the Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. Under this scheme, a one-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- along with a certificate of appreciation is awarded to the top 100 meritorious students of Class 10 and each stream (Science, Commerce, Arts) of Class 12, who are listed in the state-level merit list of the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE), Ajmer. The scheme is implemented by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Rajasthan, Bikaner.
Financial Assistance:
One-time financial assistance of ₹15,000/- is provided to economically backward students from the general category studying in government and private schools.
Certificate of Appreciation:
An official certificate is awarded along with the monetary benefit.
Application Process:
Step 1:
To avail of the benefits of the scheme, students should fill out the online application form through the institution head (principal) of their respective school.
Step 2:
Eligible students are identified by the head of their institution.
Step 3:
Submit copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required) to the respective school.
Step 4:
The school will visit the
Shala Darpan, Rajasthan
Portal.
Step 5:
Using the school's login credentials (Login ID and Password), the school will fill and submit the application form.
Post-Application Process:
Step 1:
The institution head forwards the online application to the concerned District Education Officer (DEO) Headquarters (Primary/Secondary Education).
Step 2:
The District Education Officer compiles and forwards the verified applications of all eligible students from the district to the Directorate of Secondary Education, Rajasthan, Bikaner.
Step 3:
Post-verification, the incentive amount is disbursed to the students' bank accounts.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Application Process:**

**Step 1:** To avail of the benefits of the scheme, students should fill out the online application form through the institution head (principal) of their respective school.
**Step 2:** Eligible students are identified by the head of their institution.
**Step 3:** Submit copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required) to the respective school.
**Step 4:** The school will visit the [Shala Darpan, Rajasthan](https://rajshaladarpan.rajasthan.gov.in/SD4/Home/Public2/Default.aspx) Portal.
**Step 5:** Using the school&#39;s login credentials (Login ID and Password), the school will fill and submit the application form. 
> **Post-Application Process:**

**Step 1:** The institution head forwards the online application to the concerned District Education Officer (DEO) Headquarters (Primary/Secondary Education).
**Step 2:** The District Education Officer compiles and forwards the verified applications of all eligible students from the district to the Directorate of Secondary Education, Rajasthan, Bikaner.
**Step 3:** Post-verification, the incentive amount is disbursed to the students&amp;#39; bank accounts.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
   1. The applicant should be a student.
   1. The applicant should belong to the economically backward class from the general category.
   1. The applicant should be studying in a government or private school.
   1. The applicant should have passed Class 10th, Praveshika, Class 12th (Science/Commerce/Arts), or Varishta Upadhyay examination conducted by Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education (RBSE), Ajmer.   1. The applicant should have secured a minimum of 75% marks in the qualifying examination.
   1. The applicant’s parents’ combined annual income from all sources should be less than ₹2,50,000.

The applicant should be a student.

The applicant should be studying in a government or private school.

The applicant’s parents’ combined annual income from all sources should be less than ₹2,50,000.
